forecasts.detailed: Areas of fog between 11pm and 4am, then areas of fog and a slight chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 41. Southeast wind 0 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Partly sunny, with a high near 58. East wind around 8 mph.
Mostly sunny, with a high near 73. Southeast wind around 20 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph.
Mostly cloudy, with a high near 52. East wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.

forecasts.short: Mostly Cloudy then Rain Showers Likely
forecasts.detailed: Rain showers likely after midnight. Mostly cloudy. Low around 41, with temperatures rising to around 49 overnight. South wind 9 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
Mostly sunny, with a high near 76. South wind around 14 mph.
